inputs.label: Lower Tolerance (MMC)
inputs.businessContext: Absolute deviation from nominal to smallest permissible size (e.g., 0.1 for hole at MMC = nominal - 0.1)

businessContext_i18n.en: Absolute deviation from nominal to smallest permissible size (e.g., 0.1 for hole at MMC = nominal - 0.1)
businessContext_i18n.tr: Nominalden izin verilen en küçük boyuta mutlak sapma (örneğin, MMC'de delik için 0,1 = nominal - 0,1)
businessContext_i18n.de: Absolute Abweichung vom Nennmaß zur kleinsten zulässigen Größe (z. B. 0,1 für Loch bei MMC = Nennmaß - 0,1)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Écart absolu du nominal à la plus petite taille admissible (ex. 0,1 pour un trou à MMC = nominal - 0,1)
businessContext_i18n.es: Desviación absoluta del nominal al tamaño mínimo permitido (ej., 0.1 para agujero en MMC = nominal - 0.1)
businessContext_i18n.ar: الانحراف المطلق من الاسمي إلى أصغر حجم مسموح (مثال: 0.1 للثقب عند MMC = الاسمي - 0.1)
